94:
WITH female_clients AS (
    SELECT c.client_id, c.birth_date, d.A11 AS average_salary
    FROM client c
    JOIN district d ON c.district_id = d.district_id
    WHERE c.gender = 'F'
),
oldest_female_clients AS (
    SELECT client_id, birth_date, average_salary
    FROM female_clients
    WHERE birth_date = (SELECT MIN(birth_date) FROM female_clients)
),
salary_stats AS (
    SELECT 
        MAX(average_salary) AS highest_salary,
        MIN(average_salary) AS lowest_salary
    FROM female_clients
)
SELECT 
    ofc.client_id,
    ofc.average_salary,
    ss.highest_salary - ss.lowest_salary AS salary_gap
FROM oldest_female_clients ofc
CROSS JOIN salary_stats ss;

1481:
WITH MinConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        c.Segment,
        y.CustomerID,
        SUM(y.Consumption) AS TotalConsumption
    FROM 
        customers c
    JOIN 
        yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
    WHERE 
        c.Currency = 'CZK' 
        AND y.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    GROUP BY 
        c.Segment, y.CustomerID
),
RankedConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        CustomerID,
        TotalConsumption,
        RANK() OVER (PARTITION BY Segment ORDER BY TotalConsumption ASC) AS ConsumptionRank
    FROM 
        MinConsumption
),
LowestConsumption AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        CustomerID,
        TotalConsumption
    FROM 
        RankedConsumption
    WHERE 
        ConsumptionRank = 1
),
AnnualAverage AS (
    SELECT 
        Segment,
        SUM(TotalConsumption) / COUNT(CustomerID) AS AvgAnnualConsumption
    FROM 
        LowestConsumption
    GROUP BY 
        Segment
)
SELECT 
    'SME - LAM' AS Comparison,
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'SME') - 
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS Difference
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'LAM - KAM' AS Comparison,
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - 
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS Difference
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    'KAM - SME' AS Comparison,
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - 
    (SELECT AvgAnnualConsumption FROM AnnualAverage WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS Difference;

    MAX(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption END) - 
    MAX(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption END) AS Increase,
    ((MAX(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2013' THEN y.Consumption END) - 
    MAX(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption END)) / 
    MAX(CASE WHEN SUBSTR(y.Date, 1, 4) = '2012' THEN y.Consumption END)) * 100 AS PercentageIncrease
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    PercentageIncrease DESC;
